summary: Bring attribution surfaces to the canonical creator + contributors shape via `tools/sweep-canonical -attribution-only`.
reason: The published library now uses a permanent `creator: {handle, name}` block in `.printing-press.json` plus `Copyright YYYY <name> and contributors.` headers, with a NOTICE `Created by` block and a `Created by` README byline. The sweep also adds `amazon-ads` to the curated `cliAuthorByAPIName` map so future sweeps see the canonical author display name without consulting the operator's git config.
validated_outcome: Re-running `SWEEP_OWNER_NAME="Cathryn Lavery" go run ./tools/sweep-canonical -attribution-only` reports amazon-ads as already up-to-date (idempotent).
